name: clear-decision-with-deadline
text:
Priya: ok after all that back and forth — we're going with Stripe for billing. cheaper at our volume and the API is nicer
Dev: fine by me
Sam: 👍 I'll wire up the test account by Friday July 10
Priya: great, decided then

name: standup-no-decisions
text:
Bot: Standup time!
Dev: yesterday: reviews. today: more reviews. blockers: none
Sam: same honestly lol
Priya: shipping continues

name: commitment-no-deadline
text:
Ana: someone needs to own the onboarding doc rewrite
Leo: I can take that one
Ana: thanks leo!!

name: decision-no-owner-followups
text:
Mo: so are we killing the legacy exporter or not
Jess: yes. it's costing us more than it earns, kill it next sprint
Mo: someone should tell the two customers using it
Jess: yeah… someone should

name: ambiguous-owner
text:
Kai: the infra team said they'd handle the cert rotation before the 15th
Rhea: which infra person though
Kai: sarah I think? or maybe deepak

name: meeting-notes-paste
text:
Notes from pricing sync 7/6:
- agreed: launch price $29/mo, revisit after 90 days (marketing pushed for 19, data said 29 converts fine)
- Tom to update the pricing page by Wed
- Aisha to draft the announcement email, no date set
- parking lot: annual plans

name: reversed-decision
text:
Nina: earlier we said postgres but heroku pricing changed, let's do the math again
Raj: ran it — supabase is 40% cheaper for us
Nina: ok switching the plan: supabase it is. final this time
Raj: 🫡

name: banter-with-buried-commitment
text:
Zed: did anyone see the game last night
Mel: don't get me started
Zed: 😂 anyway I'll get the demo video recorded before thursday standup
Mel: you said that last week
Zed: this time for real

name: multiple-decisions
text:
Ivy: wrapping the arch review: we go monorepo, we drop the mobile app from v1 scope, and CI moves to github actions
Ben: rationale for the mobile cut?
Ivy: not enough hands before the deadline, simple as that

name: question-only-thread
text:
Ola: what's our policy on customer data retention?
Pat: I think legal was looking into it
Ola: so no answer yet?
Pat: not yet
